headline: Vecna Robotics Appoints Cody Upp as Chief Commercial Officer As Demand for Case Flow Expands
summary: Former Zebra Technologies and 6 River Systems, Upp Brings Deep Supply Chain and Warehouse Automation Leadership ExpertiseWALTHAM, Mass., June 23, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Vecna Robotics, the leader in flexible material handling automation and warehouse orchestration solutions, today announced the appointment of Cody Upp as Chief Commercial Officer (CCO). Upp joins the company’s executive leadership team as Vecna Robotics scales to meet growing customer demand for its CaseFlow™ warehouse orchestr

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Zebra Technologies, Raises Price Target to $346
summary: Barclays  analyst Guy Hardwick   maintains Zebra Technologies (NASDAQ:ZBRA) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $345 to $346.
